_comment: Vault-local retrieval tuning. Lives at <vault>/.mvkit/retrieval_config.json (NOT committed). The kit's retrieval modules read defaults from this file; missing keys fall back to module-level constants. Edit + re-run memory eval to see the effect — no code changes required.

active_retriever._doc: Which retriever variant runs when memory_ask / memory ask is called. Options: 'combined_graph' (default — BM25 + graph walk + D7 entity short-circuit), 'combined_lean' (just D7 + BM25, lighter), 'bm25_only' (pure BM25 baseline for debugging), 'grep' (worst-case floor).
active_retriever.name: combined_graph

bm25._doc: Classic BM25 hyperparameters. k1 controls term-frequency saturation (higher = more weight to repeated terms). b controls length normalization (1.0 = full normalization, 0.0 = none).
bm25._importance_lever_doc: BM25 score multiplied by (0.7 + 0.6 * importance). Adjust these to weight importance more or less.

graph_walk._doc: How aggressively graph walk boosts BM25 candidates. Higher boost values mean graph signal dominates more vs BM25's content score.

entity_lookup._doc: D7 entity-mediated retrieval. canonical_first puts type=relationship/reference/user_fact with importance>=0.7 ahead of pure recency in retrieve_by_entity. Set to false to revert to pure-recency sort.

thin_retrieval._doc: When to auto-log a mem_GAP_retrieval-thin-* memory. score_floor: top BM25 score below this triggers thin. min_results: returning fewer than this also triggers.

soft_coverage._doc: Soft eval threshold — a question is 'answerable' if it returns at least min_results scoring at or above score_floor. coverage_target is what memory-setup's ingest loop aims for during bootstrap.

tier_overrides._doc: Per-tier overrides. profile.json's `tier` field (lean|full) picks which override block applies. Empty {} means use the values above.

full._reranker_doc: Set use_reranker=true to enable BGE cross-encoder. Tested on dev vault — train +3.4pp / blind -2.5pp. Default off.
